steps.action: Search test codebase for VAL-WEIGHT-001 tests
steps.expected: Tests verifying correction_factor for white-on-black and black-on-white
Test passes — same fg/bg produces factor ~1.0

steps.action: Search test codebase for VAL-WEIGHT-002 tests
steps.expected: Tests with 3+ contrast levels verifying monotonically decreasing correction factor
steps.observed: Found 2 tests in shaping.rs: weight_correction_monotonically_decreasing_with_contrast (line 1037, 3 levels), weight_correction_five_contrast_levels_monotonic (line 1070, 5 levels)

steps.expected: Test passes — 3 contrast levels produce monotonically decreasing factors
Test passes — 5 contrast levels produce monotonically decreasing factors

steps.action: Search test codebase for VAL-WEIGHT-003 tests
steps.expected: Test comparing sum of coverage values with and without weight correction
steps.observed: Found test weight_correction_reduces_coverage_white_on_black (line 1104) — renders glyph 'H' at base weight 400 vs corrected weight for white-on-black, asserts corrected coverage sum < base coverage sum

steps.expected: Test passes — corrected glyph coverage sum < uncorrected sum

assertions.title: Fonts without wght axis are unaffected

steps.action: Search test codebase for VAL-WEIGHT-004 tests
steps.expected: Tests applying weight correction to non-variable font, asserting identical output
steps.observed: Found 3 tests: weight_correction_no_op_for_non_variable_font (line 1215, asserts auto_weight_correction_axes returns empty), weight_correction_no_op_for_font_without_wght (line 1237, empty font data returns empty), weight_correction_no_op_rendering_identical_for_static_font (line 1260, byte-identical coverage with and without correction)

steps.expected: Test passes — non-variable font returns empty correction axes
Test passes — empty font data returns empty correction axes
Test passes — rendering byte-identical with and without correction for static font

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 4 passed, 0 failed. All 10 weight correction unit tests in shaping.rs pass. VAL-WEIGHT-001 verified via 3 tests (white-on-black < 1.0, black-on-white >= 1.0, same-color == 1.0). VAL-WEIGHT-002 verified via 2 tests (3-level and 5-level monotonic decrease). VAL-WEIGHT-003 verified via coverage sum comparison (corrected < uncorrected for white-on-black). VAL-WEIGHT-004 verified via 3 tests (empty axes for static font, empty font data, byte-identical rendering).
